## Summary
- Adds `CLAUDE.md` with project-specific guidance for Claude Code sessions
- Documents build/dev/test commands, monorepo architecture, key patterns \(auth, multi-tenancy, trip state machine, process modes\), path aliases, and important conventions

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify CLAUDE.md renders correctly on GitHub
- [ ] Confirm no other files were modified

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
